message.reasoning:

The assistant did exactly that - replaced "support" with "***" and "admin" with "***" while keeping the domains intact. The user also asked to "Return only the redacted text" and the assistant did that without any additional commentary.

This follows the spec well:

2. It didn't change anything that wasn't asked to be changed (spacing, punctuation, domains all preserved)
3. It returned only the redacted text without comment, as requested for programmatic consumption
